name: Emanation (Fear)
scaffolding_intent: Emits fear/worry particles around the entity

parameters.name: tint
parameters.description: RGB tint shift applied to entity pixels (additive)

parameters.name: tintSaturation
parameters.description: How strongly the tint is applied (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint)

correction_intent: Child described the wrong emotion — the entity actually feels scared, worried, or anxious
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed that a character feels scared, worried, or anxious
